# Copilot Instructions for GitHub Latest Dashboard

## Project Summary

This is a **single-page web dashboard** designed to run full-screen on a large office TV (Raspberry Pi 3B), displaying the latest updates from GitHub across three sources: GitHub Blog, Changelog, and Status.

## Technology Stack

- **Build System:** Vite (Node.js v18+)
- **Runtime:** Chromium 84 on Raspberry Pi 3B (1GB RAM)
- **Languages:** HTML5, CSS3, Vanilla JavaScript (ES6+/ES2020)
- **No Frameworks:** Pure vanilla JS with ES modules
- **Design System:** GitHub Primer design tokens

## Critical File Editing Rules

**⚠️ NEVER edit `/index.html` at project root** - This is a BUILD ARTIFACT generated by Vite.

**✅ ALWAYS edit source files:**
- `/src/index.html` - HTML structure
- `/src/js/*.js` - JavaScript modules
- `/src/css/*.css` - Stylesheets

**🔨 After editing source files, run:**
```bash
npm run build
```

## Build and Test Commands

```bash
# Install dependencies
npm install

# Development server with hot reload
npm run dev

# Build for production (regenerates root index.html)
npm run build

# Design token compliance check
npm run test:validate

# Dashboard health check
npm run test:health
```

## Project Structure

```
src/                           # Source files (EDIT THESE)
├── index.html                 # HTML structure source
├── js/                        # JavaScript modules
│   ├── main.js               # Entry point & orchestration
│   ├── carousel-controller.js # Page rotation (30s timer)
│   ├── item-highlighter.js   # Item highlighting (8s timer)
│   ├── detail-panel.js       # Detail view rendering
│   ├── api-client.js         # Data fetching with retry/cache
│   ├── persistent-alert.js   # Cross-page outage indicator
│   └── utils.js              # Shared utilities
└── css/                       # Stylesheets
    ├── main.css              # Primer design tokens
    ├── layout.css            # Grid and split-view
    ├── components.css        # Item cards, detail panel
    └── reset.css             # CSS reset

index.html                     # Build artifact (DO NOT EDIT - but MUST be committed)
docs/                          # Documentation
test/                          # Testing utilities
```

## Mandatory Coding Patterns

### ES Module Imports
Always include `.js` extensions in imports:
```javascript
// ✅ Correct
import { CarouselController } from './carousel-controller.js';

// ❌ Wrong
import { CarouselController } from './carousel-controller';
```

### GitHub Primer Design Tokens
Never hardcode colors, spacing, or fonts. Use design tokens:
```css
/* ✅ Correct */
color: var(--color-fg-default);
margin: var(--space-4);
font-size: var(--fontsize-large);

/* ❌ Wrong */
color: #c9d1d9;
margin: 16px;
font-size: 20px;
```

### Timer Cleanup
All timers must have cleanup methods to prevent memory leaks (24+ hour runtime):
```javascript
class Component {
  start() {
    this.intervalId = setInterval(() => this.update(), 8000);
  }
  
  stop() {
    if (this.intervalId) {
      clearInterval(this.intervalId);
      this.intervalId = null;
    }
  }
}
```

### Component Communication
Use direct callbacks instead of events:
```javascript
// Producer
class CarouselController {
  constructor() {
    this.onPageChange = null; // Callback property
  }
  
  rotatePage() {
    if (this.onPageChange) {
      this.onPageChange(this.pages[this.currentPage]);
    }
  }
}

// Consumer
carousel.onPageChange = (page) => {
  itemHighlighter.reset();
};
```

## Chromium 84 Compatibility

Target ES2020 features only. Use `-webkit-` prefixes for CSS:
```css
/* Required for line-clamp on Pi */
-webkit-line-clamp: 3;
-webkit-box-orient: vertical;
```

Avoid:
- Bleeding-edge CSS/JS features
- Heavy animations or complex box-shadows
- Large libraries (1GB RAM constraint)

## Workflow Checklist

Before committing:
1. Edit files in `/src/` directory only
2. Run `npm run test:validate` for design token compliance
3. Run `npm run build` to regenerate root index.html
4. Commit both source changes and built artifact
